title: PikPak Enhancement Master
desc_link_bookmark_space_notice: Save links, cloud archives, and cloud settings without using storage space

msg_magnet_archive_write_failed: Failed to write the cloud archive. Source files were not deleted.
msg_magnet_archive_write_verify_failed: Read-back verification failed after writing the cloud archive. Source files were not deleted; please try again later.

msg_magnet_archive_delete_dup_no_source: No duplicate source resources can be deleted; deletion was skipped.
msg_magnet_archive_delete_failed: The cloud archive was written successfully, but the original resources could not be moved to Trash. Please handle them manually.
msg_magnet_archive_delete_partial_unknow: The deletion result for some source resources could not be confirmed individually. Check Trash or the cloud drive list.
msg_magnet_archive_delete_verify_failed: Verification failed after moving source resources to Trash: {id}
msg_magnet_archive_delete_status_failed: The original resources may have been moved to Trash, but the cloud archive status could not be updated. Please verify.
msg_magnet_archive_restore_failed: Failed to parse the cloud archive. Please try again later.
msg_magnet_archive_restore_no_magnet: This cloud archive item has no parsable magnet link.
msg_magnet_archive_restore_status_failed: The parsing task was submitted, but the cloud archive status could not be updated.
reason_magnet_archive_duplicate_existing: A magnet link with the same primary key already exists in Link Bookmarks
reason_magnet_archive_detail_failed: Failed to get details. Please try again later
reason_magnet_archive_invalid: Invalid magnet link format or missing xt
reason_magnet_archive_href_over_limit: Magnet link exceeds the maximum length for a single link

msg_magnet_archive_clear_all_empty: There are no links to clear in the current cloud archive.

msg_magnet_archive_clear_failed: Failed to clear cloud archive links. Refresh and try again.
msg_link_bookmark_read_failed_retry: Failed to read. Click Refresh Official and try again

msg_magnet_archive_delete_link_confirm: Delete this cloud archive magnet link? If archived again, it will be treated as a new entry.

msg_link_bookmark_delete_sync_link_confi: This link may contain script sync data. Deleting it may affect configuration recovery. Delete it?
msg_link_bookmark_duplicate_folders_dete: Duplicate folder names were detected. The web interface cannot edit duplicate folders; merging them is recommended.
msg_link_bookmark_merge_duplicates_confi: Links in folders with the same name will be merged into the first folder, and the extra duplicate folders will be deleted. This change will sync to the official bookmark service. Continue?
msg_link_bookmark_duplicate_folder_write: This folder has a duplicate name and cannot be saved reliably on the web. Merge and repair it first.
msg_magnet_archive_reserved_folder_name_: A regular link folder is using the reserved internal cloud archive name {name}. Rename that regular folder, then run cloud archiving again.

transfer_quota_desc: Transfer quota includes the monthly transfer traffic available to each account and the daily download limit for non-members, which is usually enough for regular use. Details of your transfer quota usage are shown here.

ph_cloud_links:
Supported links:
- Magnet, HTTP, FTP, etc.
- YouTube, X (Twitter), TikTok, Facebook, etc.
Add multiple links by starting a new line.
tip_cloud_save_path: Standard cloud downloads are saved in the My Pack folder. Downloads from other apps are saved to the My [XYZ] folder, where [XYZ] is the app name.
lbl_smart_fix: Auto-fix masked magnets (Extract hash / Remove text noise)

tip_snapshot_details: PikPak cannot extract media from this link directly. It will save the complete web content as a snapshot file instead.

msg_m3u_no_valid_link: No direct video links available to export
msg_migrate_confirm:
Are you sure you want to migrate the {n} selected items to another account?

After packing, you will be logged out automatically.
Log in to the [Target Account] to complete the transfer.
msg_migrate_ready:
✅ Migration package ready!

You will be logged out shortly. Please log in to your [Target Account].
The system will automatically take over the transfer after re-login.
(Note: The migration package will expire in 1 day)
err_migrate_ban:
Packing failed: Selected items contain restricted or policy-violating content.
Please remove violating files and try again.
msg_migrate_detect:
📦 A migration package from another account has been detected!

It contains {n} items.
After accepting, the data will be saved to:
Home / Pack From Shared
If this folder does not exist, it will be created automatically.

Would you like to start the migration now?
Choose “Yes” to proceed with the migration, or “No” to cancel it.
msg_migrate_same_account: Migration cancelled: You are still logged into the original account. Stub cleared.
msg_migrate_saving: Transferring data at high speed via encrypted channel...
msg_migrate_success:
🎉 Cross-account migration complete!
All files have been successfully transferred to the current account.

algo_help_content:
Name Match: Finds folder groups with similar names and sizes.
Similarity Match: Finds folder groups with highly overlapping internal files.
Containment Match: Finds subset redundancies where small folder content is fully covered by a large folder.

Accuracy: Similarity > Containment > Name
Scope: Containment > Similarity
tip_bl_desc: Blacklisted items only removed via 'Run Cleanup Now'.
ph_bl_file: Paste or use right-click menu to add files.
tip_jav_mode_desc: ✨ Smartly extract FC2 and remove irrelevant characters
tip_ad_remove_desc: 🧹 Removes ads, URLs, junk symbols, cleans Emojis, and fixes bracket formats.
tip_ext_fix_desc: 🧩 Corrects extensions based on actual file type (MIME).
tip_ext: Play with PotPlayer or get stream link [Alt] + [E]
ph_sub_search: Type keywords, links will update below...
msg_potplayer_maybe_failed: PotPlayer may not have launched. The playback link has been copied; you can paste it into the player manually.
potplayer_fix_desc: If PotPlayer does not respond after clicking, the system usually has not registered the potplayer:// protocol correctly, or the protocol points to an old path. Follow the steps below to enter the PotPlayer program path and generate a repair file.
potplayer_fix_manual_tip:
If you have previously repaired an incorrect path, download and run the old protocol cleanup file first.
Recommended process: enter the PotPlayer program path → save the path → download the protocol repair file → run the .reg file manually → click “I have run the repair file, try again”.
potplayer_fix_i_have_fixed: I have run the repair file, try again
potplayer_fix_install_downloaded: Protocol repair file downloaded. Double-click to run it, then click try again.
potplayer_fix_delete_downloaded: Old protocol cleanup file downloaded. Double-click to run it, then generate the repair file again.
potplayer_fix_reason_auto: PotPlayer launch signal was not detected multiple times in a row
potplayer_fix_advanced_desc: Enter the full path of PotPlayer.exe, PotPlayerMini64.exe, or PotPlayerPortable.exe. Do not enter another program.
potplayer_fix_path_saved: Path saved. Please download and run the protocol repair file again.
potplayer_fix_path_invalid: Please enter a valid PotPlayer exe path
potplayer_fix_retry_need_path: Please enter the PotPlayer program path first, then download and run the protocol repair file.
potplayer_fix_path_changed: Path changed. The repair status is no longer valid. Please download and run the protocol repair file again.
potplayer_fix_version_outdated: The saved repair record is outdated. It is recommended to generate the protocol repair file again.
potplayer_fix_browser_policy_desc: Use the fallback repair file only when you have already run the protocol repair file, PotPlayer itself can open normally, but clicking PotPlayer in the browser still does not respond. Administrator privileges may be required.
potplayer_fix_browser_policy_downloaded: Browser protocol confirmation repair file downloaded
potplayer_fix_path_status_empty: Please enter the PotPlayer program path first
potplayer_fix_path_status_confirmed: Current path recorded. Confirm that you have run the repair file, then try again.
potplayer_fix_path_status_unconfirmed: Path saved. Please download and run the protocol repair file.
tip_mixed_content: Common RPC ports: • 6800 (AriaNg default) • 16800 (Motrix default)
desc_sort_indep: Sorting changes only apply to the current folder.
desc_sort_global: All folders use the same sorting (Newest first).
desc_view_indep: View changes only apply to the current folder.
desc_view_global: All folders use the same list/grid view.
label_default_video_quality: Default video player / external playback quality
label_video_load_progress_cache: Load playback progress when opening videos
desc_comic_mode: Default A-Z sorting for Image/Video only folders.
label_downloader_prefer_original_video_l: Prefer video playback links to speed up downloads
ph_idm_download_dir: Leave blank to use the IDM default path
msg_idm_exe_missing: IDMan.exe was not found. Enter the IDMan.exe path in Settings, then export the BAT again.
msg_idm_not_http: IDM currently only supports HTTP/HTTPS direct-link export
ph_aria2_dir: Leave blank to use the default path
ph_gopeed_dir: Leave blank to use the Gopeed default path
desc_gopeed_setup: 1. Open Gopeed Settings → Advanced. 2. In the API section, set the communication protocol to TCP; for local use, usually set IP: 127.0.0.1 and port: 9999. 3. In this script, enter the Gopeed API address as http://IP:port, for example http://127.0.0.1:9999. If an API Token is set, enter the same Token; after changing the protocol, IP, port, or Token, restart Gopeed before testing the connection.
ph_abdm_dir: Leave blank to use the ABDM default path
desc_abdm_setup: 1. Start AB Download Manager. 2. Confirm that the ABDM local listening service is enabled; the default address is usually http://localhost:15151. 3. If you changed the port, enter the corresponding address in this script; after making changes, restart ABDM before testing the connection.
desc_download_accel_domain: Use the acceleration address when downloading
desc_hide_button_text: Keep only icons and hover tips
ph_dl_filter_name: ReadMe1, ReadMe2, separate multiple values with commas
